description: Call after a transaction closes — gratitude, referral ask, relationship maintenance

genuine_celebration.description: Agent opens with authentic congratulations and acknowledges the significance of the milestone for the client.

transaction_recap.description: Agent briefly recaps the journey and highlights key wins — reinforces the value they delivered.

checks_on_client.description: Agent asks how the client is settling in or feeling about the sale — shows care beyond the commission.

handles_lingering_concerns.description: Agent addresses any outstanding questions, warranty items, or post-closing concerns promptly.

referral_ask.description: Agent makes a natural, non-awkward referral ask — names a specific type of person they'd like to meet.

future_relationship.description: Agent plants a seed for future business — mentions market updates, annual check-ins, or home value reviews.

review_ask.description: Agent asks for a Google or Zillow review in a genuine, low-pressure way.
